hero.subtitle: An ordinary community of people finding a bigger story. We meet at {venue}, {area}, every Sunday at {time} — and you're warmly invited.

welcome.heading: However you arrive, there's a place for you here.
welcome.body1: Whether you've followed Jesus for decades, wandered away years ago, or you're simply curious — you'll find a warm welcome, honest conversation and zero pressure. Come exactly as you are.

planSunday.heading: Everything you need before you come.
planSunday.card1Body: {day} at {time}. Doors and coffee from {arrive} — arrive early and say hello.
planSunday.card2Body: {venue}, in the centre of {area}. Step-free access and parking nearby.
planSunday.card3Body: Around 90 minutes of live music, a down-to-earth talk, groups for kids and youth, and time over coffee afterwards.

sermons.heading: Catch up on a recent talk.
sermons.body: Missed a Sunday, or want to go deeper during the week? Every talk is free to stream, whenever suits you.

findYourPlace.heading: There's far more to us than Sunday.

give.heading: Partner with what God is doing in East Devon.
give.body: Everything we do — Sundays, the foodbank, work with families and young people — is made possible by the generosity of ordinary people. Thank you.
